query:
SELECT ql.id as leadId, ql.name, ql.phone, cs.id as sessionId, cs.createdAt as sessionCreated
FROM quote_leads ql
LEFT JOIN conversation_sessions cs ON cs.leadPhone = ql.phone
WHERE ql.phone = '+13029816191'
ORDER BY ql.id DESC
LIMIT 5;
